hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2) if any(x in p for x in ['pigeon.g.dart','/generated/','pbgrpc.dart','pbjson.dart','.pb.dart','.pbenum.dart']) else sys.exit(0)"
hooks.error_message: Cannot edit generated file. Regenerate with pigeon/protoc instead.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0) if not p.endswith('.dart') else None; import subprocess; subprocess.run(['dart','format',p], capture_output=True)"
